parsed_output.justification: James (Troublemaker) claimed to have swapped Justin and Paul. Paul (Witch) claimed to have swapped Mitchell with a center card. If Paul was the Werewolf or became one through the Witch's ability, the Troublemaker's swap would have transferred the Werewolf role to Justin. Justin himself eventually admits he believes he is now the Werewolf, and the other players reach a consensus to vote him out.
